answer:
Sand, wind, warmth, vast, vibrant, swirling.  
Space, sky, ocean, boundless, blue, infinite.  
Mountains, leaves, silence, towering, verdant, peaceful.  
Earth, water, fire, fertile, resilient, powerful.  
Stars, night, day, shimmering, brilliant, eternal.  
Forest, light, shadow, dense, glowing, intricate.  
Waves, sun, moon, crashing, radiant, mesmerizing.  
River, cloud, air, flowing, soft, gentle
